description: A new 'Lawo mc² Micro Core' Audio-over-IP engine has been deployed. Read the hardware onboarding specification at ~/Desktop/hardware_onboarding_spec.txt. Create a new Device Template for this specialized hardware with the specified Name, Vendor, Category, and SysOID. Then, locate the existing misclassified device at IP 127.0.0.1 in the inventory, rename its Display Name to 'Studio-A-Core', and change its Device Template to your newly created template. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
